title: convolvulus supinus
intro: Convolvulus supinus, also known as the climbing bindweed or creeping convolvulus, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus supinus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antispasmodic. Convolvulus supinus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
